reviews.review_description: Love the game just the steering needs to be fixed you can't separate your hands when you hold the steering wheel while it crashing it throws off the steering and make you wreck it's like you got to hold the controllers together with both your hands and bend your wrists what you get tedious and annoying trying to hold your hand together with two your control push together to make it stare you separate your hands to stare it won't turn the car it just wrecks it please fix it if you play it you'll know what I'm talking about All your other games work just fine it's just this one needs some tweaking when it come to the steering either that the games fun and more maps tunnel maps nighttime driving dramatic weather like race for fun steering wheel works perfect and I see that you made that game and made the turn as well can you please fix the steering wheel like it works on race for fun if you can optimize the steering wheel to work just like it works on work race for fun that game with the turn will be a fun game to play and more appealing please fix the steering I love this game it's just a steering's bad if I separate my hands put my controller to try to stare like you look on the steering wheel it doesn't work it make you crash and it's hard and won't stare unless you double you rubber band your your controllers together and then being your wrist to make it stare that's annoying it's like when you spread your hands apart to stare with your hands tilting turn the stand like you turn the wheel stand well it doesn't respond you got to bend your arrest just to make you turn left and being your wrist right to make it turn right instead of turning with your hands like it's turned on the steering wheel

reviews.review_title: pls fix control.... even a joystick
reviews.review_description: just bought this game. control not fixed yet as car is all over the place.... a friend tried to warn me butididnt listen cos i loved the advert....massive potential. would pay more if possible. its April 2025 and just bought this game again. pls Devs can we have a thumb stick control option.... its still so hard to control----- Amazing potential right here. Do not abandon this racing game.......SO MUCH POTENTIAL.Just give us  thumbstick control option and its 7stars worthy........its now May 2025 and control still abit stiff in one of the Best Potentially racing game in the quest. pls giveus JOYSICK option.....PLS Devs.

Steering with two hands is not working properly, the only good way is to hold one hand on top part of wheel and steer by moving it left/right. Not perfect, but works at least. Steering on reverse also not working as it should. Brakes won't ever make your car to lose grip, ai just drives into you. Not many settings in main menu. Having to check controls each and every race is also bad.

If you decide to ignore all above, the experience was pretty fun, but seeing how people posted most of those 4 months ago with no response, i'm affraid it could be another dumped project.

For the price this is a really good game to get started on racing VR. If had one criticism would be the AI is overly aggressive. 
I'd like to see Time trials and ability to increase race laps. 
Racing games with homemade tracks is risky but the tracks I've used so far are pretty decent wide GP type circuits that are fun to use, maybe more difficult circuit will be added.

After playing the game for a bit, I liked what I was seeing, but most importantly I like the fact it's interactive but when I'm gripping two hands on the wheel the turning doesn't feel to natural and feel a bit delayed with my hand movement. I felt like I had to over extend both hands to turn the car  left or right. Hopefully, with an update, the control and steering will feel more precise when turning.

Graphics pretty decent ..could do with bit of improvement on steering found left hand not always steering turning car. But very addictive…what do you have to do to unlock next tracks win each race?  Early days but very promising. Loved their primal hunt game my all time favourite!!!

It's already nice game It don't get too fuzzy or blurry and don't make you dizzy with the frame rate runs well it does need some polish tho and  needs to be more busy and the controls need some work and I think  it will be soon these people made primal hunt which runs really good and has good controls and graphics so I know once this is released it's going to look  better and run even better I Don't like the steering tho I can't hold a plate and the controller so they need to loosen that up somehow where I don't have to hold the ends of the controller together to be able to steer other than that I love it it's a good company and they make good games so far so I love it at this price it'll probably be more expensive later
Great racing! Steer with one hand by turning the wrist. PLEASE FIX THE SIDE VIEW MIRRORS, THEYRE BACKWARD.

Ive been looking for some race, and ive found pretty decent and dynamic game. 

Nice cars, tracks looks pretty cool to me. Wish there was a multiplayer here 5/5
